ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user's email is verified */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "home_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home the user is associated with */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* Preferred language for voice commands */,
  "voice_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user's voice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_home_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_id") REFERENCES homes ("home_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "homes" (
  "home_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each home */,
  "home_address" TEXT /* Address of the home */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the home */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the home */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the home */,
  "home_type" TEXT /* Type of home (e.g., apartment, house) */,
  "sq_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the home */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the home */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the home */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the home was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("home_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voice_commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voice command */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who issued the command */,
  "home_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home where the command was issued */,
  "path" TEXT /* File path to the audio recording of the command */,
  "transcription" TEXT /* Transcription of the spoken command */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action to be performed (e.g., activate, increase, decrease) */,
  "object" TEXT /* Object affected by the action (e.g., lights, heat, language) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the action is to be performed (e.g., kitchen, washroom) */,
  "command_date" TEXT /* Date when the command was issued */,
  "command_time" TEXT /* Time when the command was issued */,
  "command_type" TEXT /* Type of voice command (e.g., lighting, temperature, security) */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device associated with the voice command */,
  "command_status" TEXT /* Status of the voice command (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_commands_action FOREIGN KEY ("action") REFERENCES actions ("action_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_commands_home_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_id") REFERENCES homes ("home_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_commands_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_commands_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_commands_object FOREIGN KEY ("object") REFERENCES objects ("object_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action (e.g., activate, increase, decrease) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_category" TEXT /* Category of the action (e.g., lighting, temperature, security) */,
  "action_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the action (e.g., turn on, turn off, adjust) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object (e.g., lights, heat, language) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "object_category" TEXT /* Category of the object (e.g., lighting, temperature, security) */,
  "object_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the object (e.g., lamp, thermostat, door lock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., kitchen, washroom) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., room, floor, outdoor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command history entry */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voice command */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the command (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the command was executed */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time when the command was executed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the command execution */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message associated with the command execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_history_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES voice_commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., default language, favorite color) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "preference_category" TEXT /* Category of the preference (e.g., lighting, temperature, security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voice_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voice file */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voice command the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the voice command audio */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the voice file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "upload_time" TEXT /* Time the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of voice file (e.g., WAV, MP3) */,
  "file_duration" REAL /* Duration of the voice file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_files_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES voice_commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., light, thermostat, door lock) */,
  "home_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home the device is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_home_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_id") REFERENCES homes ("home_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device setting */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., brightness, temperature) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_settings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
